name: @microverse.ts/business-scripting-engine
description: Illustrative business rules engine: mock domain APIs, domain events, and component Lua scripts via host-surface.

scripts.generate:lua-defs: microverse generate-lua-defs --surface src/businessSurface.ts --header-note "LuaLS stub for lua/components. Bridge types (Orders, Audit, …) are not globals — use self.bridges.* after component:extend()."
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @microverse.ts/host-surface run build && pnpm --filter @microverse.ts/runtime-wasm run build && pnpm --filter @microverse.ts/microverse-lua run build && pnpm run generate:lua-defs
scripts.pretest: pnpm --filter @microverse.ts/host-surface run build && pnpm --filter @microverse.ts/runtime-wasm run build && pnpm --filter @microverse.ts/microverse-lua run build && pnpm run generate:lua-defs
